chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2978 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case For hearing of main case 08-04-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General.. This petition is pending since 2023 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
